author_activity_search_notes: 9 web searches run this run: '"ovoid cavity cosmological model" review' (canonical-name), 'site:funwithscience.net dome-model-review' (our-site direct), '"dome model" "67 predictions" OR "69 predictions" flat earth review', 'john09289 predictions ECM dome model', '"firmament resonance" OR "aetheric medium" cosmology dome predictions 2026', '"Nhughes09" OR "Nicholas Hughes" dome model cosmology firmament', '"funwithscience.net" dome OR ECM OR review', '"john09289.github.io/predictions" OR "ovoid cavity" dome model', '"aether cosmology" "alanspaceaudits" OR "Space Audits"'. Results: zero on-topic hits for the author or the model's distinguishing vocabulary. Adjacent firmament/dome communities (ANIMA Framework, Journal of Geocentric Cosmology, FlatEarth.ws, Walter Bislins) appear in generic-term searches but use entirely different technical vocabulary (no Finsler coordinates, no ovoid cavity, no 20015/8537/5733 km parameters, no 67/69-prediction taxonomy, no attribution to john09289). Day 18 author public-surface silence (commit-drought) + Day 14 web-invisibility together — sustained inbound + outbound quietness.
claim_overlap_search_notes: No new significant technical overlap detected today. ANIMA Framework, Journal of Geocentric Cosmology, FlatEarth.ws, and the SSRN/ScienceOpen aether-cosmology academic papers all remain parallel-but-unrelated cosmologies — they share generic firmament/dome/aether concepts but none reproduce the dome's distinguishing features (ovoid-cavity geometry, Finsler coordinates, exponential firmament profile H(r) = 8537·exp(-r/8619), 20015-km disc radius, 67/69-prediction taxonomy). No mirror sites, no forks, no translations. TRACKED-002 (Space Audits / Aether Cosmology) confirmed via external-surface search to have its own community forum (aethercosmology.com), YouTube channel, Rumble streams, multiple wiki entries (TrueEarth, Flerf, markdownlinks) — but ZERO cross-references to john09289 or our review. Different sub-genre of flat-earth-theorizing.

registry_stability_extended.interpretation: Per poller analyst's strong-default interpretation (2026-05-03T11:30Z): HOLD-fires-without-registry-update is now diagnostic of a manual-approval gate. 5th consecutive HOLD-without-update event combined with Day 18 manual-drought is the strongest single piece of evidence yet that the dome's review pipeline is paused on the author side. Counter-argument retained: the 'manual-approval gate' hypothesis assumes a particular pipeline architecture; an alternative reading is that the AI-reviewer simply has no new candidate WINs to evaluate (registry is saturated at 69+10+4 from the author's own perspective and there's nothing to promote). Both readings predict the same surface behavior; distinguishing them requires either (a) an author commit that promotes a prospective → confirmed (gates 'manual approval' hypothesis), or (b) author silence holding while a new prospective is added by automation (rules out manual-gate, supports saturation hypothesis).

actions_taken.action: Captured aether-cosmology silence persisting ~48h (since S831 2026-05-03T10:33Z); CADENCE COLLAPSE CONFIRMED — escalating from yesterday's 'between-bursts pause hypothesis' to confirmed-cadence-collapse classification.
actions_taken.reasoning: Yesterday morning report explicitly deferred the call: 'will reclassify as genuine cadence collapse vs between-bursts pause if silence persists into next run.' Silence has persisted into the next run AND through one full additional 24h cycle (May 4 0 commits, May 5 0 commits so far). Cadence collapse from 45/24h Day -2 → 30/24h Day -1 → 6/24h-then-silent Day 0 → 0/24h Day +1 → 0-so-far Day +2 is a genuine actor-trajectory shift, not within-day variance. Counter-argument: this is an external open-source project — 48-72h pauses are normal in solo-developer projects and a true 'collapse' would require a >1-week silence. Compromise framing: 'cadence collapse confirmed for the burst-pace observed Apr 30 - May 3' (45→6→0 was burst-mode), but the actor's underlying steady-state cadence is unknown and may be exactly this. Will continue tracking but downgrade urgency unless a 7-day silence is reached.

Closing this gap is a fundamentally different strategic posture (active outreach) than what operator has authorized — operator preferences/posture remains 'do not engage externally' (per agent rules) AND 'still have not decided on an active outreach posture' (per SOCIAL-NOTE-004 item 7). Counter-argument: even if we did invest in outreach, TRACKED-002's surface is built around an actor-personality (Alan/Space Audits) hosting community discussions; we don't have a hostable persona — our content is institutional/anonymous-by-design (funwithscience-org), so the platform-surface playbook doesn't transfer 1:1. The gap is real but not closeable without a different operating model.
